title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions:
Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions!
